description: SecretServerProvider provides access to authenticate to a secrets provider server. See: https://github.com/DelineaXPM/tss-sdk-go/blob/main/server/server.go.

domain.description: Domain is the secret server domain.

password.description: Password is the secret server account password.

serverURL.description: ServerURL URL to your secret server installation

username.description: Username is the secret server account username.
